title: GitHub - algorithmicsuperintelligence/openevolve: Open-source implementation of AlphaEvolve
summary: OpenEvolve is an open-source evolutionary coding agent that leverages large language models (LLMs) to autonomously discover and optimize algorithms. It integrates MAP-Elites quality-diversity evolution with LLM ensembles, supporting multiple programming languages and tasks such as performance optimization, algorithm design, and prompt engineering. The framework provides reproducibility through seeding, island-based parallel evolution, and artifact feedback loops. Demonstrated achievements include 2-3x GPU kernel speedups and state-of-the-art circle packing solutions.
author: Asankhaya Sharma
